diagrams.title: Interrupt Flow in 8051
diagrams.description: Shows the complete interrupt handling process from main program to ISR execution and return
elements: CPU checks IE and IP registers
Save PC and PSW on stack
Fetch ISR address from vector table
diagrams.purpose: Understand the step-by-step interrupt servicing mechanism

diagrams.title: IE Register Structure
diagrams.description: 8-bit Interrupt Enable register with bit positions and their functions
diagrams.purpose: Remember which bits enable which interrupts

diagrams.title: IP Register Structure
diagrams.description: 8-bit Interrupt Priority register showing priority control bits

diagrams.title: 8051 Vector Table
diagrams.description: Memory map showing interrupt vector addresses in code memory
diagrams.purpose: Know where CPU vectors when each interrupt occurs

diagrams.title: Interrupt Priority Levels
diagrams.description: Shows priority hierarchy with natural priority and programmable priority
elements: Natural Priority when same level: INT0>T0>INT1>T1>Serial
diagrams.purpose: Understand how simultaneous interrupts are serviced
